name: S&P Syndicate Public Company Limited
summary: S&P Syndicate Public Company Limited, together with its subsidiaries, operates a chain of restaurants and bakery shops. The company operates through Domestic Restaurants and Bakery Shops, Packaged Food and Bakery Trading Business, Overseas Restaurants, and Others segments. It also produces cakes, bread, baked goods, Thai desserts, prepared frozen foods, and other bakery products; and provides home delivery, outside catering, and manufacturing service to restaurants and companies. The company sells sausage under the S&P Premo; cookies and snacks under the S&P Delio; frozen food under the S&P Quick Meal; carrageenan jelly under the S&P Jelio; and moon cake under the Golden Dragon brand names. As of December 31, 2020, it operated 502 branches in Thailand, as well as 3 franchise under the Maisen and Umenohana brands; and 15 restaurants internationally. The company was incorporated in 1973 and is headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand.
